substitution_rationale: User requested spawned Codex agents; Claude tool unavailable in current tool context; critique performed by Codex subagent using inherited frontier GPT-5-class model.
required_changes: Replace captain-villain/personality-risk phrasing without softening the official direct cause.
Make ATC route clearance versus takeoff clearance explicit.
Replace generic runway-clearance wording with takeoff-clearance wording.
Keep the CRM closing beat tied to challenge, command responsibility, and unresolved safety information.
Keep human script approval pending and audio render unauthorized.
optional_changes: Later human rhythm pass may reduce repeated rhetorical structures.
Exact CVR quotations remain deferred until verified against official report or FAA Lessons Learned source.
source_factual_cautions: The official direct cause remains KLM takeoff without clearance while Pan Am was still on the runway.
Las Palmas bombing and KLM refueling are context/contributors, not direct factors.
Do not claim Tenerife single-handedly created modern CRM.
